cta.title: Your next best-seller is one product link away.
cta.subtitle: Make your first scroll-stopping video free — no camera, no editor, no blank page.

faq.q1: How is Lumi different from generic AI video tools?
faq.a1: Lumi doesn't guess. Before it writes a single line, it studies a large sample of real, organic top-performers in your product's category and extracts the structural pattern — hook, proof, and CTA shapes that actually convert. Your script is grounded in that pattern, not a blank page.
faq.q2: Do I need to film anything or be on camera?
faq.a2: No. Choose AI Avatar mode for a presenter-led video, or Product-Only mode for clean showcase footage. Lumi generates the visuals, voice, and captions end-to-end from your product.
faq.q3: Can I review the video before it's fully rendered?
faq.a3: Yes — that's the Beat Review gate. Lumi generates a reference image for every beat (shot) first. You approve or regenerate each one, and only then does it spend render time. Prefer hands-off? Auto-QA approves beats for you.
faq.q4: Which video model does Lumi use?
faq.a4: Lumi renders with Seedance 2.0, tuning the settings per shot. More frontier video models are on the roadmap — your scripts and beats carry over when new models land.
faq.q5: Where does the product data come from?
faq.a5: Paste a link from Amazon, Shopee, TikTok Shop, or your own store — or upload your own product photos — and Lumi reads the title, description, and imagery to build from. Your products stay private to you. Prefer ideas? Browse the built-in marketplace of trending picks.
faq.q6: How long does one video take?
faq.a6: Lumi scripts, storyboards, and renders without you filming or editing — you kick it off and come back to a finished, publish-ready cut. The pattern research for a category is cached, so later videos in that category start even faster.

header.title: Start free. Scale when
header.subtitle: No credit card to begin. Cancel anytime. Annual billing saves about 20%.

pricing.creditFootnote: 1 credit = 1 second of video. Video counts are approximate, based on 20-second clips — a 15s video uses fewer credits, a 30s video more.
included: Paste any product link or browse the marketplace

faq.a1: 1 credit = 1 second of finished video. A 20-second video uses 20 credits; a 30-second one uses 30. You pick the length, and you're only charged for what you render.
faq.a2: No. Regenerating a beat while you review doesn't cost extra — credits only count the final rendered video.
faq.q3: What if I run out of credits?
faq.a3: Upgrade anytime for a bigger monthly allowance — it applies immediately. Credits reset at the start of each billing cycle.
faq.a4: Anytime. Upgrades apply immediately; downgrades take effect next cycle. Annual saves ~20% over monthly.
faq.q5: Which render model does Lumi use?
faq.a5: Lumi renders with Seedance 2.0, with more models rolling out. It picks the best settings per shot.

landing.heroTitle: Turn any product into a <highlight>scroll-stopping</highlight> shoppable video.
landing.heroSubtitle: Paste any product link — Amazon, Shopee, TikTok Shop, or your own store — or upload photos. Lumi studies what's already winning in that category, scripts a video grounded in the pattern, lets you review it beat-by-beat, and renders it with Seedance 2.0. In minutes, no camera.
landing.howSubtitle: Most tools start from nothing. Lumi starts from what's already winning — then keeps you in control all the way to publish.

header.title: We help you sell with video —
header.subtitle: Lumi is a Sellcast product. We turn any product into a scroll-stopping shoppable video, grounded in what's already winning.

about.intro1: Short-form video is the storefront now — but most sellers don't have time to film, edit, and test their way to a winner. Generic AI tools fill the gap with content that feels like AI.
about.intro2: Lumi takes a different path. Before writing a script, it studies a large sample of real, organic top-performers in your product's category and learns the structure that converts — then scripts, storyboards, and renders a video you can review beat-by-beat and ship in minutes.

grounded.title: Grounded, not guessing
grounded.body: We learn from what actually converts in a category before we generate a thing.

quality.title: Quality over volume
quality.body: Native-feeling creatives that stop the scroll — not generic AI filler.

control.title: You stay in control
control.body: Review beat-by-beat. Nothing burns render time without your sign-off (unless you want it to).

sellers.title: Built for sellers
sellers.body: Made for people who'd rather sell than film — solo creators to agencies.

about.contact: Want to talk partnerships, press, or enterprise? <email>hello@sellcast.ai</email>

blog.title: The Lumi blog is coming soon
blog.body: Playbooks on viral patterns, hooks that convert, and how top sellers scale short-form video. Be the first to read it.

careers.title: We're building the future of commerce video
careers.body: We're a small team moving fast. No open roles posted yet — but if you're exceptional at AI, video, or growth, we'd love to hear from you.

features.title: Features
features.description: Everything Lumi does — link to video, pattern-grounded scripts, beat-by-beat review, avatar & product modes, auto dialogue QA, captions & publish.

models.title: Models
models.description: Lumi renders with Seedance 2.0 today, with more frontier video models on the way. Each shot gets the settings that render it best.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Start free, scale when it's working. Lumi pricing is credit-based — 1 credit = 1 second of video. Free (first video), Creator, Pro, Scale, and Enterprise. No credit card to begin; annual saves ~20%.

about.title: About
about.description: Lumi is a Sellcast product helping sellers and creators turn products into scroll-stopping shoppable videos — grounded in real viral patterns.
